PreToolUse.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($data.toolName -eq 'edit_file' -or $data.toolName -eq 'create_file') { $path = $data.toolInput.filePath; if ($path -match 'Convy\.Domain' -and $path -notmatch 'Tests') { $content = if ($data.toolInput.content) { $data.toolInput.content } elseif ($data.toolInput.newString) { $data.toolInput.newString } else { '' }; if ($content -match 'using Convy\.Infrastructure|using Microsoft\.EntityFrameworkCore|using Npgsql') { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Domain layer must not reference Infrastructure or EF Core'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } else { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='allow'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } } else { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='allow'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } } else { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='allow'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 }"
